<USER_REQUEST>
Okay, cool. Now, this is my store view page and the product detail page. I want you to use my pre-existing website Puja Product Superbase table where you can fetch all the products there and only fetch those details which you want according to our UI. So firstly, map it what columns we have here and what we don't have, so first let me know. After that we decide we have to add any columns in the Superbase or we just have to merge the content in our UI. Please let me know, give me a brief.
